description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style and happiness in this T-shirt from Mr men. Stylized with an interesting graphic print, team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that super cool lookProduct DetailsYellow t-shirt which has a white round and split neckline and a patch stitched on inside, short sleeves with snipped edges, short placket with buttons, graphic and rubber print on the front and snipped edges on the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
